description: Official correspondence. Fragment (left side). The ends of 13 lines are preserved. Addressed to the office of the vizier (al-ḥaḍra al-sāmiya al-wazīriyya). Mentions paper (al-waraq) in l.3, and the remainder seems to concern shipment of two reams (dast, dual dastayn). The term "dast" can also refer to sets of other commodities, but the reference to waraq suggests that it refers to paper. Mentions receipt of a letter from the ʿāmil (l. 4). Reused for Hebrew piyyuṭ.
description_he: התכתבות רשמית; שבר (צד שמאל); מופנה ללשכת הוזיר; מזכיר נייר (אל-וַרַק) ומשלוח של שני ריסים (דַּסְת); מזכיר קבלת מכתב מהעָמִל; שימוש חוזר: פיוט עברי
